characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion, long straight brown hair. She has expressive brown eyes and a natural makeup look.
characters.demeanor: Hesitant, slightly nervous but eager to learn.

characters.appearance: Stylized 3D animated young adult female, fair complexion, greyish-white hair tied back with some loose strands. She has large, expressive eyes and smooth, flawless skin.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: My name Priya. [My name Priya.]
Character B says: आपका मतलब है, "My name is Priya"? [Do you mean, "My name is Priya"?]
Character A says: Sorry... मेरी English थोड़ी weak है। [Sorry... my English is a bit weak.]
Character B says: कोई बात नहीं! क्या आप कहना चाहती थीं, "Sorry, I speak a little English"? [No problem! Did you mean to say, "Sorry, I speak a little English"?]
Character A says: हाँ। [Yes.]
Character B says: बिल्कुल ठीक। वैसे, पिछले कुछ महीनों में आपने कितनी बार English में बात की है? [Perfectly fine. By the way, how many times have you spoken in English in the last few months?]
Character A says: सच कहूँ तो... कभी नहीं। [To be honest... never.]
Character B says: आप बिल्कुल सही जगह पर हैं। हम रोज़ साथ में practice करेंगे, और जल्द ही आप confidence के साथ English बोल पाएंगी। [You are in exactly the right place. We will practice together every day, and soon you will be able to speak English with confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable, common English mistake.
- Demonstrates the AI tutor's gentle, non-judgmental correction style.
- Highlights the core problem (lack of speaking practice) and offers daily practice as the solution.
